name: Wave-Motion Inferno
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>虚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>波</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While you have no cards in your hand, face-up "Infernity" monsters you control gain 400 ATK and DEF. You can send this face-up card from the field to the Graveyard to send all cards from your hand to the Graveyard.
eff: While you have no cards in your hand, face-up "Infernity" monsters you control gain 400 ATK and DEF. You can send this face-up card from the field to the Graveyard to send all cards from your hand to the Graveyard.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
